About HFA
Healthy Families America (HFA) is one of the leading family support and evidence-based home visiting programs in the United States.
70,000
Families involved with HFA each year
100,000
Children involved with HFA per year

since HFA was launched

38
States + DC + US Territories
Laurie McBain
Healthy Families Rensselear County
Working for Healthy Families is such an honor. Every day, we are invited into families’ homes and witness the success and growth of parents and children who have chosen to partner with us.
About Prevent Child Abuse (PCA) America
Since 1972, Prevent Child Abuse America has defined the national approach to the prevention of child abuse and neglect.
Learn more
PCA America & HFA Connection Points
Explore the various connection points between HFA’s work and the wider lens of Prevent Child Abuse (PCA) America.

Our Full Team
Healthy Families America (HFA) is PCA America’s signature home visiting program. To support the HFA network, our full organization—all of us working together—is required!
